The '''''Vaya''-class scout''' was a type of scout ship manufactured by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]] c. [[3999 BBY]].<ref name="TOTJC" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Vaya-tur.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A ''Vaya''-class scout ship dropping a [[Hyperspace beacon/Legends|hyperspace beacon]]]]
The ''Vaya''-class was a large and comfortable ship, with plenty of room for extended deployments. It was sturdy and reasonably well-armed for a scout ship.<ref name="TUR" />

The ship had a design flaw concerning its ion engines, the two left engines being prone to shutting down when stressed by complex maneuvering. If this occurred, the ship would possibly fall into a dangerous spin.<ref name="TOTJC" />

==History==
They were used extensively by the [[Republic Astrogation Survey Team]] in uncharted space. In such missions, they had only a 3% failure rate.<ref name="TOTJC" /> They were also popular with independent scouts and explorers due to their low cost and spacious interiors. They often served as mobile homes for entire families.<ref name="TUR" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] {{1st}}
